auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage your properties
auth.termsNotice: By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters.
auth.resetEmailSent: If an account with that email exists, a reset link has been sent.

properties.title: Properties
properties.subtitle: Manage your buildings and units
properties.emptyDescription: Get started by adding your first property.
properties.name: Property name
properties.saveError: Failed to save. Please check your connection.

payments.title: Payments
payments.subtitle: Track rent payments and follow up on late payments
payments.emptyDescription: Payments will appear here once leases are active.
payments.ignoreDescription: This payment will be excluded from rent tracking and automated reminders. You can restore it at any time.
payments.waiveCharges: Waive all charges during this period
payments.deductionReasonPlaceholder: e.g. agreed rent reduction, defect compensation...

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.subtitle: Manage your tenants and their information
tenants.emptyDescription: Add your first tenant to get started.
tenants.saveError: Failed to save. Please check your connection.

leases.title: Leases
leases.subtitle: Manage rental contracts and agreements
leases.emptyDescription: Create your first lease to start tracking payments.
leases.saveError: Failed to save. Please check your connection.
leases.coTenantsNote: Multiple tenants selected - they will be added as co-tenants on the lease.

indexation.title: Rent Indexation
indexation.subtitle: Automatic rent adjustments based on the health index
indexation.epcWarningDescription: Brussels and Flanders have EPC-based restrictions on rent indexation. Properties with a poor energy label may have limited or no indexation allowed.
indexation.emptyDescription: Indexation calculations will appear here when leases have anniversary dates approaching.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure your payment follow-up and preferences
settings.automatedFollowUpDescription: Automatically check for overdue payments 3 times per day (00:00, 10:00, 17:00) and send escalating reminders.
settings.escalationDescription: Configure when each reminder level is triggered after the payment due date.
settings.finalNoticeDescription: Includes a PDF overview with payment details and interest charges.
settings.chargeInterestDescription: Interest will be calculated and shown in the final notice PDF.
settings.subject: Subject
settings.landlordReportDescription: Receive automatic email reports summarising the payment status of all your tenants.
settings.reportScheduleDescription: Choose which days of the month you want to receive a payment overview report.
settings.skipIfAllPaid: Skip report if all payments are received
settings.skipIfAllPaidDescription: Do not send a report email when every tenant has paid on time. You will only be notified when there are outstanding or overdue payments.
settings.templateLanguageDescription: Emails are sent in the tenant's preferred language. Customize templates per language below.
settings.bankAccountsDescription: Manage the bank accounts used for rent collection.
settings.noBankAccountsDescription: Add a bank account to start collecting rent payments.

landing.heroSubtitle: Automate rent collection, payment reminders, and rent indexation. Built for Belgian landlords, with full EPC compliance and SEPA direct debit.
landing.agplNotice: Licensed under AGPL-3.0. Self-host for free or use our managed hosting.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to manage your properties
landing.featuresSubtitle: Purpose-built for the Belgian rental market with full legal compliance.
landing.featurePaymentsDesc: Track rent payments, late fees, and generate structured communications automatically.
landing.featureIndexationDesc: Automatic rent calculations based on the Belgian health index with EPC restrictions.
landing.featureRemindersDesc: 3-step escalation: friendly, formal, final notice with PDF overview and interest.
landing.featureEpcDesc: Automatic Brussels and Flanders EPC-based indexation restrictions built in.
landing.featureTenantsDesc: Full tenant profiles with language preferences, national register, and communication history.
landing.featureMultilingualDesc: Dutch, French, German, and English. Emails sent in each tenant's preferred language.
landing.featureLeasesDesc: All Belgian lease types supported: 9-year, short, lifetime, student, and commercial.
landing.featureMaintenanceDesc: Automatic reminders for fire alarms, heating maintenance and chimney sweeps. Never miss an inspection.
landing.featureSepaDesc: Collect rent automatically via GoCardless SEPA Core. No more chasing bank transfers.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start for free with self-hosting, or let us handle the infrastructure.
landing.planStarterDesc: Perfect for a single rental property.
landing.planStandardDesc: For landlords with a small portfolio.
landing.planProDesc: For property managers and large portfolios.
landing.pricingSelfHost: Prefer to self-host? Rentular is free and OpenSource under AGPL-3.0.
landing.comparisonSubtitle: See how we stack up against other Belgian property management tools.
landing.openSourceCta: Rentular is and will always be OpenSource. Inspect the code, contribute features, or self-host on your own infrastructure. No vendor lock-in, ever.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.subtitle: Periodic maintenance and inspections for your properties
maintenance.emptyDescription: Add periodic tasks or click 'Auto-generate' to create tasks for all your leases.
maintenance.uncoveredLeases: {count, plural, one {# lease} other {# leases}} without maintenance tasks
maintenance.uncoveredLeasesHint: Click 'Auto-generate' to automatically add fire alarms, heating maintenance and chimney sweeps.

support.title: Rentular Support
support.subtitle: We're here to help
support.welcomeMessage: Hi! How can we help you today? Ask us about billing, features, or report an issue.
support.autoReply: Thank you for your message. Our support team will get back to you shortly.
support.offlineMessage: We're currently offline. Your message has been saved and we'll respond as soon as possible.
